en: The saying is trustworthy: If anyone aspires to the office of overseer, he desires a noble task.
zh: “如果有人渴慕監督的職分，他就是愛慕善工。”這話是可信的。

en: Therefore an overseer must be above reproach, the husband of one wife, sober-minded, self-controlled, respectable, hospitable, able to teach,
zh: 所以作監督的，必須無可指摘，只作一個妻子的丈夫，有節制，自律，莊重，樂意接待客旅，善於教導，

en: not a drunkard, not violent but gentle, not quarrelsome, not a lover of money.
zh: 不好酒，不打人，只要溫和，與人無爭，不貪財，

en: He must manage his own household well, with all dignity keeping his children submissive,
zh: 好好管理自己的家，使兒女凡事敬重順服。

en: for if someone does not know how to manage his own household, how will he care for God's church?
He must not be a recent convert, or he may become puffed up with conceit and fall into the condemnation of the devil.
zh: 初信主的不可作監督，恐怕他驕傲，就落在魔鬼所受的刑罰裡。

en: Moreover, he must be well thought of by outsiders, so that he may not fall into disgrace, into a snare of the devil.
zh: 作監督的也必須在教外有好聲譽，免得他被人毀謗，就落在魔鬼的陷阱裡。

en: Deacons likewise must be dignified, not double-tongued, not addicted to much wine, not greedy for dishonest gain.
zh: 照樣，執事也必須莊重，不一口兩舌，不酗酒，不貪不義之財，

en: They must hold the mystery of the faith with a clear conscience.
zh: 用清潔的良心持守信仰的奧祕。

en: And let them also be tested first; then let them serve as deacons if they prove themselves blameless.
zh: 他們也必須先受考驗，若沒有可責之處，然後才讓他們作執事。

en: Their wives likewise must be dignified, not slanderers, but sober-minded, faithful in all things.
zh: 照樣，他們的妻子 也要莊重，不說讒言，有節制，凡事忠心。

en: Let deacons each be the husband of one wife, managing their children and their own households well.
zh: 執事只可以作一個妻子的丈夫，善於管理兒女和自己的家。

en: For those who serve well as deacons gain a good standing for themselves and also great confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
zh: 那善於作執事的，就為自己得了好的位分，也因著相信基督耶穌得到大大的膽量。

en: I hope to come to you soon, but I am writing these things to you so that,
zh: 我把這些事寫給你，希望不久可以到你那裡去；

en: if I delay, you may know how one ought to behave in the household of God, which is the church of the living God, a pillar and buttress of truth.
zh: 假如我來遲了，你也可以知道在 神的家裡應該怎樣行。這家就是永活 神的教會、真理的柱石和根基。

en: Great indeed, we confess, is the mystery of godliness: He was manifested in the flesh, vindicated by the Spirit, seen by angels, proclaimed among the nations, believed on in the world, taken up in glory.
zh: 敬虔的奧祕真偉大啊，這是眾人所公認的，就是： “他在肉身顯現， 在聖靈裡稱義 ， 被天使看見； 被傳於列國， 被世人信服， 被接到榮耀裡。”
